_doc: Item-overhaul v2 (2026-06-04). Schema: weapons have damage_min/max/speed/damage_type/weapon_class. Body slots have armor + evasion. Jewelry has zero baseline. All slots roll affixes from per-slot affix_pool. Uniques can carry implicit_affixes (item-defining bonuses, never roll). 5 archetype-unique spell tomes shipped with this migration.

items.name: Bone Knife
items.lore: Fashioned from something that used to be alive.

items.name: Chipped Short Sword
items.lore: A serviceable blade, if you ignore the nicks.

items.name: Iron Dagger
items.lore: Standard issue for those who prefer not to be seen.

items.name: Rusty Dagger
items.lore: A battered blade, more rust than iron.

items.name: Shiv
items.lore: Improvised. Effective. Ugly.

items.name: Short Falchion
items.lore: A light curved blade. More than it looks.

items.name: Elven Dagger
items.lore: Light enough to forget you're carrying it, until you aren't.

items.name: Iron Falchion
items.lore: A broad single-edge blade. Prefers wide swings.

items.name: Orcish Short Sword
items.lore: Hacked from black iron. Bites first, asks nothing.

items.name: Quick Blade
items.lore: The fastest blade in the Dungeon. Blink and it's already over.

items.name: Rapier
items.lore: A slender thrusting weapon. Rewards patience.

items.name: Steel Short Sword
items.lore: Properly forged. An honest weapon.

items.name: Iron Long Sword
items.lore: A proper weapon for a proper fight.

items.name: Mithril Short Sword
items.lore: Light. Strong. Expensive to replace.

items.name: Scimitar
items.lore: A curve that finds every gap in armor.

items.name: Silver Rapier
items.lore: Dipped in holy water before forging. Undead hate it.

items.name: Silver Sabre
items.lore: Silver-edged. Blessed. Smells faintly of incense.

items.name: Steel Falchion
items.lore: A proper blade, properly made.

items.name: Elven Broadsword
items.lore: Longer than it looks. Lighter than possible.

items.name: Elven Short Sword
items.lore: Almost too light to feel. Compensates by being very sharp.

items.name: Katana
items.lore: Simple. Exact. Deadly.

items.name: Knife of Accuracy
items.lore: Always finds the right place to be. Unfortunately for whatever it lands in.

items.name: Mithril Long Sword
items.lore: Light enough to carry all day, heavy enough to end the day.

items.name: Runed Falchion
items.lore: Sigils run down the blade, each one a name.

items.name: Runed Scimitar
items.lore: The runes pulse when it cuts. Nobody knows why.

items.name: Steel Long Sword
items.lore: Dependable. Exactly as good as it needs to be.

items.name: Ancient Sword
items.lore: Nobody remembers who made it. Nobody dares ask.

items.name: Arc Blade
items.lore: Lightning runs the length of the blade. It hisses when wet.

items.name: Bloodbane
items.lore: Drinks deep from those it cuts. Never seems satisfied.

items.name: Chilly Death
items.lore: Leaves wounds that refuse to close. Cold as the depths of Glacier.

items.name: Crystal Long Sword
items.lore: Carved from a single growth of arcane crystal. Hums when hungry.

items.name: Demon Blade
items.lore: Forged in a plane that shouldn't exist. Wants to go back.

items.name: The Doom Knight's Blade
items.lore: A weapon that has ended civilizations. It prefers it that way.

items.name: Eos
items.lore: Forged from a fragment of dawn. It does not dim.

items.name: Firestarter
items.lore: A blade wreathed in eternal flame. It doesn't burn you. Yet.

items.name: Gyre
items.lore: The blade orbits the hand as if alive, striking twice where others strike once.

items.name: The Sword of Jihad
items.lore: Each kill draws the bearer further into something they can't quite name.

items.name: Majin-Bo
items.lore: Whispers names of the people the bearer has lost. Or will lose.

items.name: Mithril Katana
items.lore: Forged over seven years. Used for the rest.

items.name: The Serpent's Scourge
items.lore: Drips. Doesn't matter what you wipe it with.

items.name: The Singing Sword
items.lore: A blade said to sing in battle. The tune changes with each kill.

items.name: Spriggan's Knife
items.lore: Light as a leaf-stem. Faster than thought.

items.name: Sword of Cerebov
items.lore: Cerebov never let it go. Even in defeat. Even now.

items.name: Sword of Power
items.lore: ATK scales with the bearer's current HP. The healthy hit hardest.

items.name: Sword of Zonguldrok
items.lore: Each kill rises briefly to fight beside the bearer. Briefly.

items.name: Vampire's Tooth
items.lore: It thirsts. Always. The wearer learns to provide.

items.name: Wyrmbane
items.lore: Forged to end dragons. Still hungry.

items.name: Iron Brigandine
items.lore: Cheap and reliable. Heavy on the shoulders.

items.name: Leather Jerkin
items.lore: Smells of old smoke.

items.name: Orcish Leather
items.lore: Cured rough. Smells like a forge.

items.name: Patchwork Robe
items.lore: Mended often. Keeps falling apart.

items.name: Studded Leather
items.lore: Iron rivets in a leather grid. Doesn't catch on fences.

items.name: Tattered Hide
items.lore: Whatever it was, it's leather now.

items.name: Elven Leather
items.lore: Lighter than air, by all accounts.

items.name: Fine Chainmail
items.lore: Each ring closed cleanly. A craftsman's pride.

items.name: Orcish Chainmail
items.lore: Not pretty. Not subtle. Stops things.

items.name: Orcish Ringmail
items.lore: Hammered hot, riveted cold. Effective.

items.name: Scale Mail
items.lore: Each scale overlaps the next. Almost fish.

items.name: Scout's Robe
items.lore: Dyed in grass-shadow. Nobody sees it coming.

items.name: Troll Hide
items.lore: Raw hide, still healing slowly. So is the wearer.

items.name: Banded Mail
items.lore: Bands ring against each other when you walk.

items.name: Elven Scalemail
items.lore: Mithril-scaled, light as silk, strong as steel.

items.name: Orcish Platemail
items.lore: Looks like it was bashed into shape. It was.

items.name: Splint Mail
items.lore: Strips of steel over linen. A compromise that works.

items.name: Troll Leather Armor
items.lore: It bleeds when struck. The bleeding stops on its own.

items.name: Fire Dragon Armor
items.lore: Warm where you wear it. Warmer where it strikes.

items.name: Green Dragon Scales
items.lore: Dappled jade. Worn by a wyrm who poisoned cities.

items.name: Ice Dragon Armor
items.lore: Cold to the touch. Colder when struck.

items.name: Mottled Dragon Scales
items.lore: Patchwork brown. Spat sticky napalm.

items.name: Plate Armor
items.lore: Forged plates. Heavy. Honest.

items.name: Shimmering Dragon Scales
items.lore: The colors shift with what's looking at it.

items.name: Swamp Dragon Armor
items.lore: Always damp. Smells faintly of bog.

items.name: Wyrmscale Hauberk
items.lore: Built around the spine of something that never stopped flying.

items.name: Armor of Zhor
items.lore: Worn by Zhor, who could not be found. Or hurt.

items.name: Crystal Plate
items.lore: Living crystal grown over a hauberk. Hums in melee.

items.name: Robe of the Dragon King
items.lore: Worn by the wyrm who claimed the title. Briefly.

items.name: Maxwell's Etheric Cage
items.lore: An armor that holds its wearer in place. Spells slide off the bars.

items.name: Faerie Dragon Hide
items.lore: Light enough to be silly. Strong enough to be feared.

items.name: Gold Dragon Armor
items.lore: Each scale catches the sun. Catches the spell, too.

items.name: Lear's Chainmail
items.lore: Worn by a king who refused to take it off.

items.name: Lightning Scales
items.lore: Crackles when struck. Doesn't always wait to be struck.

items.name: Pearl Dragon Armor
items.lore: Worn by saints, briefly. Always returned.

items.name: Quicksilver Dragon Scales
items.lore: Liquid sheen. Always slightly off-pace with the rest of the world.

items.name: Ratskin Cloak
items.lore: Stitched from a thousand rats. They were a problem first.

items.name: Robe of Clouds
items.lore: Fades in and out of solid the longer the wearer stands still.

items.name: Robe of Folly
items.lore: Anyone who wears it makes one terrible decision. They survive it.

items.name: Robe of Misfortune
items.lore: Bad things happen near it. Worse things happen when struck.

items.name: Robe of Night
items.lore: Dimmer than the room around it. Always.

items.name: Shield of Resistance
items.lore: Worn by spell-eaters. Charred at the cuffs.

items.name: Salamander Hide
items.lore: Hot to the touch. Cold to the things hitting it.

items.name: Shadow Dragon Armor
items.lore: Light bends around it. So do gazes.

items.name: Shadow Dragon Scales
items.lore: Lighter than the mail. Darker than the void.

items.name: Silver Dragon Armor
items.lore: Spectral wyrm. Spell-thirsty even in death.

items.name: Cloak of Starlight
items.lore: Twilight clings to it. So does whatever's hunting you.

items.name: Battered Skullcap
items.lore: Dented in too many places to count.

items.name: Iron Skullcap
items.lore: Cold iron. Better than soft leather.

items.name: Jester's Cap
items.lore: Bells included. They jingle even on the dead.

items.name: Leather Cap
items.lore: Soft leather. Better than nothing.

items.name: Padded Coif
items.lore: Quilted layers absorb the worst of it.

items.name: Plumed Helm
items.lore: A flourish that announces a fight.

items.name: Ranger's Hood
items.lore: Drawn close, the wearer's face becomes weather.

items.name: Crested Helm
items.lore: Worn by sergeants who outlived their lieutenants.

items.name: Elven Leather Helm
items.lore: So light you forget it isn't your own scalp.

items.name: Etched Helm
items.lore: The runes don't quite stay still in lamplight.

items.name: Kettle Helm
items.lore: A common soldier's helm. Practical to a fault.

items.name: Champion's Helm
items.lore: Worn by those who finished the tournament.

items.name: Green Mask
items.lore: The mask sees what the wearer hasn't. Yet.

items.name: Knight's Helm
items.lore: Heavy and hot. Worth it when the blow comes.

items.name: Visored Basinet
items.lore: All eyes, no expression. Effective.

items.name: Wizard's Hat
items.lore: Only the truly wise wear something this silly.

items.name: Dragonbone Helm
items.lore: Carved from a wyrm too old to remember its hatchling name.

items.name: Mage-Bound Helm
items.lore: The bindings hum when spells fly nearby.

items.name: Helm of the Thane
items.lore: Worn by mountain-thanes who never quite died.

items.name: Visor of the Watchman
items.lore: It sees in the dark. It sees the dark.

items.name: Spectre's Cowl
items.lore: Cold cloth. Things see less of you while you wear it.

items.name: Warlord's Visor
items.lore: It looks at the battlefield differently.

items.name: Hat of the Archmage
items.lore: Pointier than the regulation hat. Worn by the difficult professors.

items.name: Cornuthaum
items.lore: The Wizard's Hat. The W is implied.

items.name: Crown of Dyrovepreva
items.lore: It remembers every order it ever wore.

items.name: Crystal Crown
items.lore: It refracts more than light.

items.name: Helm of the Warden
items.lore: Issued to the lieutenants of the gate. Returned, mostly.

items.name: Halo of Ascension
items.lore: Rests just above the head. Doesn't ask permission.

items.name: Hat of Pondering
items.lore: It thinks for you. You don't always agree.

items.name: Helm of the High Council
items.lore: Six hands forged it. Five of them disagreed.

items.name: Helm of the Dragon
items.lore: Worn by the last knight to challenge the wyrm. Briefly worn by the wyrm afterward.

items.name: King's Diadem
items.lore: Worn while signing the order to attack.

items.name: Iron Buckler
items.lore: Hammered iron disc with a strap.

items.name: Kite Shield
items.lore: Long enough to crouch behind.

items.name: Round Shield
items.lore: Worn down by decades of arrow strikes.

items.name: Wooden Buckler
items.lore: Round, plain, splintery.

items.name: Elven Buckler
items.lore: Light. Almost silly. The dents tell another story.

items.name: Elven Targe
items.lore: Filigreed silver vines. The vines grow if you stop looking.

items.name: Guardsman's Kite
items.lore: Standard issue. Never quite clean.

items.name: Reinforced Buckler
items.lore: Iron rim welded over wood. Twice the weight, twice the life.

items.name: Dwarven Buckler
items.lore: Stout, riveted, slightly grumpy.

items.name: Dwarven Roundel
items.lore: Heavier than its size. Heavier than its weight.

items.name: Elven Shield
items.lore: Gilt with leaves. Holds blows lightly.

items.name: Large Kite
items.lore: Tall as a person. Heavy as a person.

items.name: Spellward Kite
items.lore: Engraved against magic. The runes sting when struck.

items.name: Scion's Bulwark
items.lore: Forged in deep halls. Inherited.

items.name: Donald's Shield
items.lore: Donald lost it once. Briefly.

items.name: Dragoncrest Shield
items.lore: Forged from a dragon's claw. The crest still looks angry.

items.name: Fortress Wall
items.lore: Heavy enough to redefine 'block.'

items.name: Spriggan Shield
items.lore: Light as a leaf. Doesn't move when hit.

items.name: Tower Shield
items.lore: A wall, briefly portable.

items.name: Bullseye
items.lore: Painted concentric. Ranged attackers find it irresistibly aimable-at.

items.name: The Gong
items.lore: Every blow rings out. Half a mile away, things wake up.

items.name: The Doom Knight's Shield
items.lore: Bears the same crest as the blade. Worn together. Buried apart.

items.name: Louise's Shield
items.lore: Forged for a knight who didn't believe in retreat.

items.name: Phantom Aegis
items.lore: Half-translucent. Catches things that aren't there yet.

items.name: Shield of Reflection
items.lore: Polished. Dangerous to look into.

items.name: Gauntlets of War
items.lore: Carried to a thousand battles. Always returned home.

items.name: Warlord's Bulwark
items.lore: Borne in front of the line.

items.name: Leather Boots
items.lore: Cracked, weather-beaten, comfortable.

items.name: Soft Shoes
items.lore: Quieter than the bot wearing them.

items.name: Studded Boots
items.lore: Brass studs. Loud on stone.

items.name: Worn Sandals
items.lore: Soles thinner than mood.

items.name: Ranger Boots
items.lore: Soft soles, double-stitched. Worn by those who don't want to be heard.

items.name: Scout's Treads
items.lore: Patterned to match the forest floor — and the boots that crossed it.

items.name: Soldier's Greaves
items.lore: Government issue. Blood-stained at the seams.

items.name: Ironshod Boots
items.lore: Iron plates over felt. Heavy enough to be heard.

items.name: Sentinel Greaves
items.lore: Built for the watch. Built for the charge.

items.name: Swiftstep Boots
items.lore: Lightly enchanted. Each step shorter than the last.

items.name: Earthshaker Treads
items.lore: Each step leaves a shallow crater in stone.

items.name: Stormrunner Boots
items.lore: Lightning never quite catches them.

items.name: Vanguard Sabatons
items.lore: First through the breach. Last to leave the field.

items.name: Assassin's Boots
items.lore: Silent on stone, silent on grass, silent on graves.

items.name: Fencer's Gauntlets
items.lore: They lead. The rest of the body follows.

items.name: Cloak of Flash
items.lore: When they move, light moves out of the way.

items.name: March of Kings
items.lore: Worn at the head of the column. Always.

items.name: Cloak of the Thief
items.lore: They've left more places than they've entered.

items.name: Treads of Apocalypse
items.lore: What the wearer steps on does not get up.

items.name: Windwalkers
items.lore: Heels barely brush the ground.

items.name: Brass Ring
items.lore: Stamped with a rune. The rune doesn't mean anything.

items.name: Bronze Ring
items.lore: Heavy enough to feel.

items.name: Clay Ring
items.lore: Crude. Almost ceremonial.

items.name: Copper Ring
items.lore: Bright when new. Green now.

items.name: Glass Ring
items.lore: Cool. Fragile-feeling. Doesn't shatter.

items.name: Wooden Ring
items.lore: A whittled circlet. Splinters more than it should.

items.name: Agate Ring
items.lore: Banded stone, polished smooth.

items.name: Iron Ring
items.lore: Hammered cold. Will not give.

items.name: Jade Ring
items.lore: Cold. Always cold. Even when hot.

items.name: Silver Ring
items.lore: Tingles when spells fly nearby.

items.name: Steel Ring
items.lore: Edge-tempered. Sharper than it looks.

items.name: Coral Ring
items.lore: Smells faintly of the sea. Always.

items.name: Granite Band
items.lore: Heavy on the finger. Heavier on the mind.

items.name: Moonstone Ring
items.lore: Glows faintly at night. Heals the same.

items.name: Sapphire Ring
items.lore: Cold despite the air.

items.name: Topaz Ring
items.lore: Warm to the touch.

items.name: Tiger's Eye Ring
items.lore: It watches. It doesn't blink.

items.name: Tourmaline Ring
items.lore: The wearer ducks slightly more than necessary.

items.name: Emerald Ring
items.lore: Green flecks. Always cool.

items.name: Ivory Ring
items.lore: Old. Yellowed. Forgotten by what made it.

items.name: Black Onyx Ring
items.lore: Light declines to land on it. So do gazes.

items.name: Opal Ring
items.lore: Catches every color. Spits some back.

items.name: Ring of Flight
items.lore: Heels barely brush the floor while it's worn.

items.name: Ruby Ring
items.lore: Hot to the touch. Hotter when struck.

items.name: Shiny Ring
items.lore: Polished beyond reason. Nobody likes the wearer in dim corridors.

items.name: Twisted Ring
items.lore: Looks like it was bent on purpose. Maybe.

items.name: Diamond Ring
items.lore: Catches every light source on the floor.

items.name: Engagement Ring
items.lore: Inscribed with a name nobody remembers. Lights up around the right person.

items.name: Gold Ring
items.lore: Heavy. Worn by people who could afford a target.

items.name: Ring of the Mage
items.lore: Drained of one mage's worth of magic. Now full of yours.

items.name: The Octoring
items.lore: Eight in one. Or one in eight. Depends who's counting.

items.name: Pearl Ring
items.lore: Iridescent. Cool against the skin.

items.name: Ring of Robustness
items.lore: Thick. Indelicate. Effective.

items.name: Ring of Shadows
items.lore: The wearer's shadow does not always follow.

items.name: Shaolin Ring
items.lore: Worn by a fist that ended a war.

items.name: Blue Cameo
items.lore: A face carved into shell. Looks vaguely benevolent.

items.name: Bone Pendant
items.lore: Bone wrapped in twine. Bleached by something.

items.name: Celtic Knot Amulet
items.lore: Endless knot. Heals slow.

items.name: Cylinder Amulet
items.lore: Hollow lead. Rattles.

items.name: Knot of the Faithful
items.lore: Worn by pilgrims. Their gods listen back.

items.name: Watching Eye
items.lore: It tracks across the room. So does its wearer.

items.name: Ring Pendant
items.lore: Glows when its wearer is angry. Often.

items.name: Standing Stone
items.lore: Smooth stone with a hole bored through. Older than language.

items.name: Verdant Pendant
items.lore: Living crystal. Drinks light to heal its wearer.

items.name: Pentacle of Wrath
items.lore: Five points. Each one a name burned in.

items.name: Bleeding Stone
items.lore: Always slightly damp. Always. The wearer cuts deeper.

items.name: Sea-Worn Stone
items.lore: Smooth as a tide pool. Watches.

items.name: Bloodstone Pendant
items.lore: It hungers. The wearer's edges sharpen, their guard slips.

items.name: Saintly Visage
items.lore: Cast in gold. Probably copies a real face.

items.name: Verdant Cabochon
items.lore: The wearer's center of gravity shifts.

items.name: Veiled Sigil
items.lore: A purple sigil floats above the stone, slightly above. Always.

items.name: Amulet of Bloodlust
items.lore: Beats slightly faster than the wearer's heart. Always slightly faster.

items.name: The Finger
items.lore: A real finger. Old. Don't ask whose.

items.name: Amulet of Air
items.lore: Cool wind around the wearer's neck. Always.

items.name: Amulet of Vitality
items.lore: Worn by those who refused to fall.

items.name: Brooch of Shielding
items.lore: A faint shimmer surrounds the wearer in any light.

items.name: Cekugob's Amulet
items.lore: Cekugob never died. The amulet is the proof.

items.name: Pearl of Vitality
items.lore: Bright. Still. Growing slowly.

items.name: King's Cameo
items.lore: Worn by a king who outlived his enemies. Most of them.

items.name: The Four Winds
items.lore: Four directions held in one circle. Each promises something.

items.name: Sigil of the Last Line
items.lore: Five points held tight. Whatever crosses, returns.

items.name: Leather Gloves
items.lore: Stiff leather, palm-worn smooth.

items.name: Studded Gloves
items.lore: Brass studs at the knuckle. Loud where it lands.

items.name: Riveted Gloves
items.lore: Iron rivets staked through cured hide.

items.name: Plate Gauntlets
items.lore: Articulated steel — every knuckle covers itself.

items.name: Dwarven Gloves
items.lore: Lighter than they should be. Stronger too.

items.name: Elven Gauntlets
items.lore: Plates fitted to every knuckle.

items.name: Ring-Inlaid Gloves
items.lore: Each ring inlaid by hand, said to deflect spite.

items.name: Warlord's Gauntlets
items.lore: Fingerprints of an old champion still on the grip.

items.name: Storm Gauntlets
items.lore: The leather hisses faintly, as though it remembers.

items.name: Leather Cloak
items.lore: Coarse weave. Keeps the rain out, mostly.

items.name: Traveler's Cloak
items.lore: Worn in the rain. Still warm enough.

items.name: Wool Cloak
items.lore: Hood deep enough to hide a face.

items.name: Hooded Cloak
items.lore: Hood deep enough to hide a face.

items.name: Woven Cloak
items.lore: Tailored for those who do not wish to be seen.

items.name: Ranger's Cloak
items.lore: Tailored for those who do not wish to be seen.

items.name: Silken Cloak
items.lore: Bears the high marshal's clasp.

items.name: Warlord's Cloak
items.lore: Silk so fine the wind passes through it twice.

items.name: Hand Axe
items.lore: Plain hardwood haft, head bound with iron.

items.name: Orcish Hand Axe
items.lore: Orcish iron, crude and heavy at the head.

items.name: Steel Hand Axe
items.lore: Steel forged tight — splits more than wood now.

items.name: War Axe
items.lore: Plain head, plain shaft. Plain damage.

items.name: Dwarven War Axe
items.lore: Dwarven iron, balanced for both hands or one.

items.name: Steel War Axe
items.lore: Steel run thin enough to whistle on the swing.

items.name: Runed War Axe
items.lore: Runes dyed dark in the blade — no one remembers their meaning.

items.name: Battle Axe
items.lore: Two-handed iron. Pretends to nothing.

items.name: Steel Battle Axe
items.lore: Steel head and ash haft, balanced cruelly.

items.name: Runed Battle Axe
items.lore: Runes burn cold along the blade in winter air.

items.name: Warlord's Battle Axe
items.lore: Carried into three hundred fights. Still hungry.

items.name: Broad Axe
items.lore: Wide bite. Wider crater.

items.name: Steel Broad Axe
items.lore: Steel forged thick — splits shields like kindling.

items.name: Runed Broad Axe
items.lore: Runed at the throat. The wind groans before it lands.

items.name: Executioner's Axe
items.lore: A cold weight. Nothing struck by it twice.

items.name: Doomed Executioner
items.lore: Said to fall by its own will once a name is spoken.

items.name: Club
items.lore: Knotted wood. Crude, certain.

items.name: Spiked Club
items.lore: A weight that ends arguments.

items.name: Mace
items.lore: Iron flanged. Settles bone disputes.

items.name: Steel Mace
items.lore: Steel head, heavy as a verdict.

items.name: Dwarven Mace
items.lore: Dwarven steel, fluted to crack plate.

items.name: Morningstar
items.lore: Spikes for the spaces armor forgets.

items.name: Steel Morningstar
items.lore: Steel and starlight; a heavier kind of light.

items.name: Runed Morningstar
items.lore: Each spike etched with a saint's name.

items.name: Eveningstar
items.lore: Heavier than it ought to be. Quieter, too.

items.name: Runed Eveningstar
items.lore: Cools the air around it. Steady. Silent. Inevitable.

items.name: Flail
items.lore: A hinged answer to a shielded question.

items.name: Dire Flail
items.lore: Two heads, one purpose. Both of them final.

items.name: Spiked Flail
items.lore: A hinged answer to a shielded question.

items.name: Warhammer
items.lore: Squared head, square purpose.

items.name: Steel Warhammer
items.lore: Squared head, square purpose.

items.name: Giant Club
items.lore: A whole thigh of oak. Listens for ribs.

items.name: Spear
items.lore: A pole, a point. The simplest mathematics.

items.name: Orcish Spear
items.lore: A pole, a point. The simplest mathematics.

items.name: Steel Spear
items.lore: A pole, a point. The simplest mathematics.

items.name: Trident
items.lore: A pole, a point. The simplest mathematics.

items.name: Halberd
items.lore: Half axe, half spear, all decision.

items.name: Steel Halberd
items.lore: Half axe, half spear, all decision.

items.name: Bardiche
items.lore: A long blade on a longer haft. Reach kills.

items.name: Runed Bardiche
items.lore: A long blade on a longer haft. Reach kills.

items.name: Scythe
items.lore: Curved for harvest. Any kind of harvest.

items.name: Reaper's Scythe
items.lore: Tall, thin, patient. Gathers what was promised.

items.name: Greatsword
items.lore: Two-handed. Honest about it.

items.name: Steel Greatsword
items.lore: Steel run long. Long enough to mind.

items.name: Claymore
items.lore: Heavy steel, balanced against itself.

items.name: Runed Claymore
items.lore: A wall of edge, swung like weather.

items.name: Blessed Claymore
items.lore: A wall of edge, swung like weather.

items.name: Double Sword
items.lore: Two blades fused at the spine. Twice the verdict.

items.name: Triple Sword
items.lore: Three edges nest like petals. Each finds its own.

items.name: Quarterstaff
items.lore: Two ends. Both wrong to stand near.

items.name: Metal Staff
items.lore: Two ends. Both wrong to stand near.

items.name: Lajatang
items.lore: Twin blades on a single shaft. Nothing slips between.

items.name: Bullwhip
items.lore: Forged with care, used with intent.

items.name: Braided Whip
items.lore: Made by a hand that knew what it was for.

items.name: Demon Whip
items.lore: The leather is not leather. The cracking is not air.

items.name: Ankus
items.lore: Made by a hand that knew what it was for.

items.name: Cutlass
items.lore: Forged with care, used with intent.

items.name: Naval Cutlass
items.lore: Made by a hand that knew what it was for.

items.name: Fireball Tome
items.lore: An autocast tome — pages crackle as the spell readies itself.

items.name: Apprentice Fireball
items.lore: Innate to your species — runs in the blood.

items.name: Throwing Daggers
items.lore: Innate to your species — runs in the blood.

items.name: Reaver's Edge
items.lore: Each axe weeps a thin, crimson line through the air.

items.name: Comet Tome
items.lore: Where it lands, the ground keeps burning.

items.name: Frostbite Tome
items.lore: Their feet freeze to the floor before they can flee.

items.name: Storm Brand Tome
items.lore: The arc forks again and again, hungry for ground.

items.name: Radiance Tome
items.lore: Slower to draw, but it cleanses everything in its path.

items.name: Magic Dart Scroll
items.lore: A simple cantrip — fast, frequent, surprisingly effective at scale.

items.name: Iron Shot Tome
items.lore: Hurls a dense iron slug — slow, but it crashes through ranks.

items.name: Sandblast Codex
items.lore: A short, brutal cone of grit — flays anything in arm's reach.

items.name: Vampiric Drain Grimoire
items.lore: A thready bolt that returns a portion of life to its caster.

items.name: Shatter Tome
items.lore: A radial concussion — the ground itself moves with you.

items.name: Splinterfang
items.lore: Each dart fractures on impact — three splinters where there was one.

items.name: Ironcrash
items.lore: The shot strikes hard and leaves a wake of dust that drags at the legs.

items.name: Veil of Grit
items.lore: Fine dust, fine pain — the targets simply cannot see what hits them.

items.name: Soulhunger
items.lore: A famished bolt — every kill stokes a quickening hunger.

items.name: Earthsong
items.lore: The first crash is a question. The second is the answer.
